urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Trump Media to sell instant access to 'market-moving' social posts
latest.summary: Trump Media & Technology Group is launching a paid service to provide Wall Street firms with rapid access to influential posts on Truth Social. The service, named Truth API, will deliver posts in milliseconds and operate continuously.
latest.details: Trump Media & Technology Group is launching a paid service to provide Wall Street firms with rapid access to influential posts on Truth Social. The service, named Truth API, will deliver posts in milliseconds and operate continuously. This initiative aims to create a new revenue stream for the company, which is currently not profitable. The White House has declined to comment on whether President Trump's posts will be included in this paid service.
latest.full_brief: Trump Media & Technology Group is launching a paid service to provide Wall Street firms with rapid access to influential posts on Truth Social. The service, named Truth API, will deliver posts in milliseconds and operate continuously. This initiative aims to create a new revenue stream for the company, which is currently not profitable. The White House has declined to comment on whether President Trump's posts will be included in this paid service.

latest.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
latest.summary: The Japanese parliament has passed a bill to relax imperial succession rules, allowing the adoption of distant male relatives. Women will now retain their royal status after marrying outside the family, but the ban on female emperors remains unchanged.
latest.details: The Japanese parliament has passed a bill to relax imperial succession rules, allowing the adoption of distant male relatives. Women will now retain their royal status after marrying outside the family, but the ban on female emperors remains unchanged. The bill is the first significant amendment to the Imperial House Law since 1949, reflecting public concern over the lack of male heirs. Opinion polls indicate strong public support for allowing a female emperor in Japan.
latest.full_brief: The Japanese parliament has passed a bill to relax imperial succession rules, allowing the adoption of distant male relatives. Women will now retain their royal status after marrying outside the family, but the ban on female emperors remains unchanged. The bill is the first significant amendment to the Imperial House Law since 1949, reflecting public concern over the lack of male heirs. Opinion polls indicate strong public support for allowing a female emperor in Japan.

latest.title: Australia 'deeply frustrated' over Laos methanol poisoning charges
latest.summary: The Australian government expressed deep frustration over Laos not pursuing more serious charges related to the deaths of six backpackers from methanol-laced alcohol. Australians Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles were among the victims who died at a hostel in Vang Vieng in November 2024.
latest.details: The Australian government expressed deep frustration over Laos not pursuing more serious charges related to the deaths of six backpackers from methanol-laced alcohol. Australians Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles were among the victims who died at a hostel in Vang Vieng in November 2024. The Laos ministry has indicated that the most serious charges would carry only a fine and a one-year prison sentence. Australia's Foreign Ministry has summoned Laos' ambassador to express their concerns.
latest.full_brief: The Australian government expressed deep frustration over Laos not pursuing more serious charges related to the deaths of six backpackers from methanol-laced alcohol. Australians Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles were among the victims who died at a hostel in Vang Vieng in November 2024. The Laos ministry has indicated that the most serious charges would carry only a fine and a one-year prison sentence. Australia's Foreign Ministry has summoned Laos' ambassador to express their concerns.

latest.title: Burnham's 'Manchesterism' got him to No 10 - but will it work for the UK?
latest.summary: Andy Burnham's political strategy, termed 'Manchesterism', has gained attention as he prepares to become prime minister. He has ambitious plans for Manchester, including hosting major sporting events to boost the city's profile.
latest.details: Andy Burnham's political strategy, termed 'Manchesterism', has gained attention as he prepares to become prime minister. He has ambitious plans for Manchester, including hosting major sporting events to boost the city's profile. Burnham's approach is rooted in Manchester's history of combining free market principles with social responsibility. The city has experienced significant economic growth, prompting discussions on applying this model to the entire UK.
latest.full_brief: Andy Burnham's political strategy, termed 'Manchesterism', has gained attention as he prepares to become prime minister. He has ambitious plans for Manchester, including hosting major sporting events to boost the city's profile. Burnham's approach is rooted in Manchester's history of combining free market principles with social responsibility. The city has experienced significant economic growth, prompting discussions on applying this model to the entire UK.

latest.title: Taco Bell removes lettuce from menu in US after links to explosive diarrhoea
latest.summary: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people across five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations.
latest.details: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people across five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA has advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell is replacing the lettuce from its supplier indefinitely as a precautionary measure.
latest.full_brief: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people across five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA has advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell is replacing the lettuce from its supplier indefinitely as a precautionary measure.

latest.title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
latest.summary: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingya asylum seekers left Myanmar's Rakhine state on 29 June and have not been heard from since. It is likely that both boats capsized due to rough seas and their poor condition.
latest.details: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingya asylum seekers left Myanmar's Rakhine state on 29 June and have not been heard from since. It is likely that both boats capsized due to rough seas and their poor condition. Chris Lewa, who runs the Arakan Project, has been trying to piece together what happened but faces significant challenges due to a lack of communication. The Bangladesh authorities have recovered the body of one woman, suggesting a tragic outcome for the passengers.
latest.full_brief: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingya asylum seekers left Myanmar's Rakhine state on 29 June and have not been heard from since. It is likely that both boats capsized due to rough seas and their poor condition. Chris Lewa, who runs the Arakan Project, has been trying to piece together what happened but faces significant challenges due to a lack of communication. The Bangladesh authorities have recovered the body of one woman, suggesting a tragic outcome for the passengers.

latest.title: Air quality plummets in 20 US states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads
latest.summary: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis.
latest.details: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.
latest.full_brief: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.

latest.title: JD Vance accuses Israel of 'manipulating' US public opinion to prolong Iran war
latest.summary: JD Vance accused certain members of the Israeli government of manipulating US public opinion regarding the ongoing war with Iran. He expressed concern that this influence could affect American leadership's judgment.
latest.details: JD Vance accused certain members of the Israeli government of manipulating US public opinion regarding the ongoing war with Iran. He expressed concern that this influence could affect American leadership's judgment. The US recently reached a memorandum of understanding with Iran, which included a ceasefire and negotiations. Vance has been actively involved in these negotiations, attending meetings in Pakistan and Switzerland.
latest.full_brief: JD Vance accused certain members of the Israeli government of manipulating US public opinion regarding the ongoing war with Iran. He expressed concern that this influence could affect American leadership's judgment. The US recently reached a memorandum of understanding with Iran, which included a ceasefire and negotiations. Vance has been actively involved in these negotiations, attending meetings in Pakistan and Switzerland.

latest.title: Pele's 1958 World Cup final shirt sells for $4.9m
latest.summary: A shirt worn by Pele during the 1958 World Cup final has sold for $4.9m (£3.6m) at a Sotheby's auction in New York. This sale makes it the second most valuable football jersey sold, following Diego Maradona's Argentina shirt from the 1986 World Cup.
latest.details: A shirt worn by Pele during the 1958 World Cup final has sold for $4.9m (£3.6m) at a Sotheby's auction in New York. This sale makes it the second most valuable football jersey sold, following Diego Maradona's Argentina shirt from the 1986 World Cup. The auction received a total of 10 bids from more than five bidders, indicating strong interest in the item. Brendan Hawkes, Sotheby's head of sports strategy and development, highlighted the shirt's significance in Pele's rise to global fame.
latest.full_brief: A shirt worn by Pele during the 1958 World Cup final has sold for $4.9m (£3.6m) at a Sotheby's auction in New York. This sale makes it the second most valuable football jersey sold, following Diego Maradona's Argentina shirt from the 1986 World Cup. The auction received a total of 10 bids from more than five bidders, indicating strong interest in the item. Brendan Hawkes, Sotheby's head of sports strategy and development, highlighted the shirt's significance in Pele's rise to global fame.

latest.title: A Tide-Fueled Trove of Biodiversity in Guinea-Bissau
latest.summary: The Bijagós archipelago in Guinea-Bissau is home to expansive mudflats, sandy beaches, and mangrove forests that support a diverse range of wildlife. The region is recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site due to its unique ecosystems and biodiversity.
latest.details: The Bijagós archipelago in Guinea-Bissau is home to expansive mudflats, sandy beaches, and mangrove forests that support a diverse range of wildlife. The region is recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site due to its unique ecosystems and biodiversity. It is estimated that the islands support around 870,000 migratory shorebirds, making it a crucial feeding area in West Africa. The tidal patterns in the archipelago contribute to its rich marine life, including a significant population of green sea turtles.
latest.full_brief: The Bijagós archipelago in Guinea-Bissau is home to expansive mudflats, sandy beaches, and mangrove forests that support a diverse range of wildlife. The region is recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site due to its unique ecosystems and biodiversity. It is estimated that the islands support around 870,000 migratory shorebirds, making it a crucial feeding area in West Africa. The tidal patterns in the archipelago contribute to its rich marine life, including a significant population of green sea turtles.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
